sections.title: Geographic Location and Area
paragraphs: Beirut is located on the Mediterranean coast in western Lebanon and is the political, economic, and cultural capital of the Lebanese Republic.
The city covers about 200 square kilometers and includes a historic seaport and a vibrant central business district.
Beirut is distinguished by its strategic Mediterranean location and long history as a commercial and cultural center in the region.

cta.title: Help Build Better Arab Cities
cta.description: Join a network of municipalities, researchers, and practitioners in a pioneering experience
